rationale: Educ. Code §29.452 governs applicability of a forensic state supported living center subchapter to alleged offenders. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: This subchapter applies only to an alleged offender resident of a forensic state supported living center designated under Section 555.002, Health and Safety Code.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
